eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Allegan, MI; at 4:58 AM on OCT 10, 2019 Effective until 5:13 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST OF THE EMEREGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR ALLEGAN COUNTY. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.
